verificationMethod: curl HEAD with Mozilla user-agent (-m 12s, follow redirects). Failures retried with GET. 404/403/000 responses for known-stable .gov agency domains were trusted on the basis of well-documented anti-bot protection; uncertain URLs left as '#' placeholders.
notes: Verification was done in two passes. First pass (the 'MVP 8'): CA, AZ, TX, NY, MD, PA, IL, VA - all five fields verified.
Second pass: remaining 42 states + DC - most fields verified, with 9 placeholders documented per-state below.

Anti-bot protection (Cloudflare, etc.) blocks HEAD/curl on several state portals (AR, CO, MA, NH, UT, VT, NJ, NC nursing, Ohio subdomains, Minnesota, Mississippi housing). Where the canonical domain is well-known (e.g. mass.gov, vermont.gov), the URL is trusted despite curl returning 403/404.
Some state nursing boards operate on non-.gov domains (ncbon.com, ndbon.org, nevadanursingboard.org). These are still the official boards and are included.
Hawaii motor vehicle services are county-administered - no state-wide DMV URL exists.
Tax fields for Alaska, Florida, Texas, Tennessee, Washington, etc. point to the relevant Department of Revenue / Comptroller even though those states have no personal state income tax.

placeholders.HI.dmvUrl: Hawaii motor vehicle services are administered at the county level (Honolulu, Hawaii, Maui, Kauai). No state-wide DMV URL exists; users should be directed to their county.
placeholders.ID.boardOfNursingUrl: Idaho Board of Nursing (ibn.idaho.gov) returned DNS errors during verification.
placeholders.MS.housingAgencyUrl: Mississippi Attorney General site (ago.state.ms.us) returned DNS errors; no stable replacement found in this pass.
placeholders.NM.boardOfNursingUrl: New Mexico Board of Nursing's typical URLs (nmbon.unm.edu, nmbon.org) failed verification.
placeholders.SD.boardOfNursingUrl: South Dakota Board of Nursing's expected path on doh.sd.gov returned 404.
placeholders.TN.boardOfNursingUrl: Tennessee Board of Nursing's expected paths under tn.gov/health returned 404.
placeholders.WA.boardOfNursingUrl: Washington Nursing Care Quality Assurance Commission's expected paths under doh.wa.gov returned 404.
placeholders.WY.officialWebsiteUrl: Wyoming state homepage (wyo.gov) returned DNS errors. Try wyoming.gov on follow-up.
